ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default YAML configuration to include in all Chatterbox blocks.
ast.target: 包含在所有 Chatterbox 块中的默认 YAML 配置。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
// Example: 

mode: simple
maxMessageWidth: 60%
authors:
  john:
    authorFull: John Smith
    authorColor: "#BD640B"
ast.target:
// 示例：

mode: simple
maxMessageWidth: 60%
authors:
  john:
    authorFull: John Smith
    authorColor: "#BD640B"
